title: Notifications
emptyDescription: You'll see your notifications here when you have active commitments

commitment_activated.title: Your commitment is now active
commitment_activated.body: Good luck with '{{commitmentName}}'! Your {{durationDays}}-day journey begins today. Your supporters are cheering you on.

commitment_restarted.title: A new chapter begins
commitment_restarted.body: You've started fresh with '{{commitmentName}}'. Every restart is a choice to keep going. Your supporters have been invited to join you again.

checkin_missed.title: A day without a check-in
checkin_missed.body: Yesterday passed without recording progress on '{{commitmentName}}'. Would you like to reflect on what happened?

evaluation_summary.title: Your week in review
evaluation_summary.body: This week: {{completedCount}} check-ins completed out of {{totalDays}} days. Current streak: {{streakCurrent}} days.

supporter_invited.title: You've been invited to support someone
supporter_invited.body: {{inviterName}} has asked you to be a supporter for their commitment '{{commitmentName}}'. Your support can make a real difference.

check_in_verified.title: Your check-in was verified
check_in_verified.body: {{supporterName}} verified your check-in on '{{commitmentName}}'. Keep up the great work!

check_in_disputed.title: A check-in was disputed
check_in_disputed.body: {{supporterName}} disputed your check-in on '{{commitmentName}}'. Reach out to understand their concerns.

verification_pending.title: New check-in to verify
verification_pending.body: {{ownerName}} submitted a check-in for '{{commitmentName}}'. Review it within 48 hours.

comment_received.title: {{supporterName}} commented on your check-in
comment_received.body: {{supporterName}} left a comment on your check-in from {{checkInDate}}

push.permissionMessage: Receive reminders and updates about your commitments
push.registrationFailed: Failed to register for push notifications. You can enable them later in settings.
